hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Su'esu'e feso'ota'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, fa'ata'ita'iga, ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'apitoa mai la matou 'au inisinia.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Matou te su'esu'eina tuaoi aoga i AI, otometi, ma tufatufaina faiga, ona fa'aliliuina lea o su'esu'ega fa'amaonia i le fa'atuatuaina gaosiga gafatia.

researchAreas.title: Vaega o Suesuega
researchAreas.description: O vaega taula'i ta'itasi e tu'ufa'atasia su'esu'ega su'esu'ega ma auala fa'atinoina ua fuafuaina mo faiga moni.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Fa'amatalaga auiliili o le taula'iga
detailedFocusBriefs.description: O su'esu'ega lata mai o lo'o aga'i atu nei mai le fausaga fausaga i le tu'uina atu o fuafuaga.

fromLabToProduction.title: Mai le Lab i le Gaosiga
fromLabToProduction.description: O le fou i Horizon e fuaina i taunu'uga o le lafoina, ae le o fa'ata'ita'iga tu'ufa'atasia.

roadmap.title: R&D Roadmap
roadmap.description: O se alualu i luma fa'asolosolo mai le gafatia-fausiaina i fetu'una'i, fa'aauau pea ona fa'aleleia faiga.

publications.title: Lomiga ma Malamalamaaga
publications.description: Fa'amatalaga fa'apitoa ma le fa'atinoina o fa'amatalaga mai le fa'aauau pea o galuega fou.

appliedAi.title: Applied AI Systems
appliedAi.description: Gaosiga-taula'i AI fausaga aofia ai fa'ata'ita'iga tautua, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga.

automationFrameworks.title: Fa'avae Fa'aautomatika
automationFrameworks.description: Meafaigaluega otometi i totonu mo le saogalemu o le fa'aaogaina, tali atu i fa'alavelave, ma toe fa'afouina inisinia workflows.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: Su'esu'ega i le maufetuuna'i, tufatufaina fausaga fa'aleleia mo le fa'atinoga, fa'apalepale sese, ma le fua.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Atamai i le pito mo maualalo-latency filifiliga, telemetry gaosiga, ma masini va'a fa'amaopoopoina.

nlp.title: Fa'agasologa o le Gagana Fa'anatura
nlp.description: Multilingual malamalama paipa mo le fa'avasegaina, fa'aliliuga, fa'aliliuga, ma talanoaga faiga.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Su'esu'e ma fa'aleleia faiga musuia e le natura filifiliga e foia ai maualuga-dimensional inisinia luitau.

automationFrameworks.title: Fa'avae Fa'aautomatika
automationFrameworks.description: O lo'o matou fausiaina fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga mo le fa'asa'olotoina o faitoto'a, faitoto'a lelei, ma le fa'amaoniga o le fa'aaogaina e fa'aititia ai le fete'ena'iga o tusi lesona a'o fa'aleleia le fa'atuatuaina.

advancedArchitecture.title: Advanced Architecture Experimentation
advancedArchitecture.description: O a matou su'esu'ega fausaga e taula'i atu i le fa'aleagaina o auaunaga, koluse-itulagi fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, ma fa'atinoga teutusi mo faiga o lo'o fa'agaioia i lalo o le fesuisuia'i mana'oga.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: O lo'o matou fa'amaonia mea na tutupu-tafe ma pito inference mamanu e mafai ai ona vave fa'aiuga i le lotoifale a'o fa'asaoina le fa'atonutonuina tutotonu, su'ega, ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Fetuutuunai Gafatia Fuafuaina
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Lab prototypes ua fa'amaonia fa'asaga i simulated workloads ona tu'ufa'atasia lea i totonu o fa'avae autoscaling fuafuaga.

operationalIntelligence.title: Fa'amatalaga Fa'agaioiga
operationalIntelligence.description: O paipa NLP e alu ese mai fa'ata'ita'iga fa'atonutonu i le gaosiga lagolago workflows mo le vave fa'ata'ita'iga ma malamalamaaga manino.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Optimization i Delivery Systems
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: O metotia fa'ata'ita'i na fa'ata'ita'ia i le fale su'esu'e e fa'aliliuina i afi fa'aleleia mo le fa'atulagaina ma le tufatufaina.

edgeDecisioning.title: Faaiuga a le Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT ma pito inference fa'ata'ita'iga ua fa'ama'a'aina i maualalo-latency tautua ma tapula'a fa'atuatuaina.

now.title: Fa'avae AI Fa'aaogaina
now.description: Fa'alauteleina fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, iloiloga suites, ma tulaga fa'ata'ita'i i luga o 'au oloa.

next.title: Autonomous Engineering Workflows
next.description: Fa'agaioiga otometi fa'avae e fa'aititia ai le lamatiaga o le fa'aaogaina ma fa'apu'upu'u ai manatu faaalia mo le lafoina.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native Intelligence
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Fua hybrid ao-pito fausaga mo latalata moni-taimi inference i latency-maaleale siosiomaga.

longHorizon.title: Fa'aauau Optimization Systems
longHorizon.description: Tu'ufa'atasia fa'ata'ita'iga, mata'ituina, ma fa'aleleia ina ia mafai ai e faiga ona fetu'una'i ma le saogalemu pe a suia tulaga.

aiReliability.title: Inisinia AI Faiga E Tumau Fa'atuatuaina i le Gaosiga
aiReliability.summary: O se vaaiga aoga i le faapaleniina o le saoasaoa o le experimentation ma le pulega o le gaosiga.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Tufatufaina Fausaga Mamanu mo Maualuga-Tuputupu A'e Fausaga Tulaga
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: O fa'amatalaga mai fa'ata'ita'iga fausaga na taula'i atu i le fa'atinoga, maufetuuna'i, ma le faigofie o le fa'agaioiga.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Fa'afanua Fa'afanua Fa'aaogaina R&D mo Pisinisi Taunu'uga
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Fa'afefea ona matou fa'atulagaina taumafaiga fou ina ia maua mai le fa'ata'ita'iga i le taua fua.

cta.title: Fausia ma Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Pa'aga fa'atasi ma matou e fa'amaonia vave manatu fa'apitoa ma fa'agaioia manatu fa'amaonia i le saogalemu, scalable gaosiga faiga.
cta.secondary: Va'ai i Taunuuga o le Kilivaina

hero.title: Applied AI Systems
hero.description: O se aotelega aoga o le auala e mamanuina ai e Horizon, fa'apipi'i, ma fa'agaioia masini a'oa'oina faiga mai le fa'ata'ita'iga i le gaosiga.
hero.back: Toe fo'i i le Innovation Lab

machineLearningPipelines.title: Masini A'oa'oina Pipelines
machineLearningPipelines.description: Gaosiga AI amata i paipa reproducible e feso'ota'i fa'amatalaga, fa'ata'ita'iga, fa'amaonia, ma fa'amatalaga.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: O le fa'aaogaina o fuafuaga e filifilia e fa'avae i luga o mana'oga latency, fa'alavelave fa'apisinisi, ma le fa'agaioiga faigata.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: MLOps Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga
mlopsOperatingModel.description: O fa'ata'ita'iga a le MLOps e fa'amautinoa ai le fa'atuatuaina o faiga AI, fa'atautaia, ma fa'ateleina a o tuputupu a'e le fa'aaogaina.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Mataituina ma le Fa'atuatuaina
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability tapunia le matasele i le va o amioga fa'ata'ita'iga ma fa'agaioiga taunu'uga.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Fa'amaumauga ma Fa'amatalaga Fa'ainisinia
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: O le fa'aaogaina o fa'amaumauga, siaki lelei, ma fa'amatalaga e mafai ona toe fa'aaogaina e fausia ai se fa'avae fa'atuatuaina mo a'oa'oga fa'ata'ita'iga.

modelDevelopment.title: Atina'e Fa'ata'ita'iga
modelDevelopment.description: O fa'ata'ita'iga o lo'o siakiina ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga, fa'ata'ita'iga fa'amoemoe, ma fa'atusatusaga fa'avae otometi.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Fa'amaoniga ma le Saogalemu Faitoto'a
validationAndSafetyGates.description: O fa'ata'ita'iga a le sui tauva e pasia le fa'atinoga, malosi, ma faiga fa'avae a'o le'i fa'amaonia mo le fa'asa'olotoina.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: O le telemetry pe a mae'a le fa'aaogaina e fa'ailoa ai le toe a'oa'oina o mea e fa'amuamua, fa'aiuga fa'aiuga, ma le isi fa'ata'ita'iga fuafuaga.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Auaunaga Inference Taimi Moni
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Maualalo-latency API mo feso'ota'iga talosaga ma autoscaling, caching, ma talosaga-tulaga mata'ituina.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Fa'aputuga ma Tafe Valo'aga
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Fa'atulagaina ma mea na tutupu-tulia paipa mo maualuga-aofa'i sikoa i luga o analytics ma fa'agaioiga workflows.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Edge-Aware Deployment
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge tautua mamanu mo siosiomaga e mana'omia ai le lotoifale inference ma fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga tutotonu.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD mo Fa'ata'ita'iga
ciCdForModels.description: Otometi fausiaina, fa'ata'ita'iga, ma fa'asa'olotoina workflows fa'aititia le lamatiaga o le fa'aaogaina ao fa'asaoina le saoasaoa o le kilivaina.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Fa'ata'ita'iga Fa'ata'ita'iga ma le Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned fa'ata'ita'iga artifacts ma fa'alauiloaina tulaga, gafa, ma fa'amaonia workflows fa'aleleia le fa'atonutonuina ma traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Auauna atu i Atina'e Tetele
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable tautua vaega ma rollout metotia e pei o canary ma ata fa'apipi'i lagolagoina saogalemu suiga pulega.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Fa'amaumauga o le fa'aaogaina, fa'agaioiga ma le fa'atinoina o le tau
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Fa'amaumauga o fa'amaumauga o fa'amaumauga ma fa'amaumauga o fa'amaumauga
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Su'esu'ega mo le tausisia ma le su'esu'eina o mea na tutupu

cta.title: Fua Fa'aaogaina AI ma le Mautinoa
cta.description: Afai o lo'o e fuafuaina AI taumafaiga e mana'omia fuaina taunu'uga ma taimi umi tausiga, Horizon mafai ona fesoasoani mamanuina ma fa'agaioia le atoa faiga lifecycle.

hero.title: Tele gagana NLP
hero.description: Su'esu'e gafatia fa'agasologa o le gagana fa'anatura ma pe fa'afefea ona latou fua i totonu o fa'atuatuaina, multilingual gaosiga faiga.
hero.back: Toe fo'i i le Innovation Lab

foundations.title: NLP Fa'avae
foundations.description: O le fa'agasologa o le gagana masani e tu'ufa'atasia ai fa'ailoga o le gagana ma le a'oa'oina o masini e maua ai le uiga, fa'amoemoega, ma le fausaga mai tusitusiga.

workbench.title: Feso'ota'iga NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Fa'aaoga le fa'ata'ita'iga e fa'ata'ita'i ai le mauaina o le gagana, fa'ata'ita'iga o lagona, fa'alapotopotoga fa'amalosi, ma fa'aliliuga amioga i le taimi moni.

productionApplications.title: Fa'afefea ona fa'aaoga e Horizon le NLP i le gaosiga
productionApplications.description: O le NLP agava'a o lo'o tu'ufa'atasia i pisinisi fa'agaioiga ma fa'atinoga puipuiga ma manino lelei metotia.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Fa'atuatuaina ma Mataupu Faavae o le Pulega
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: O le gaosiga o le NLP e mana'omia ai le sili atu nai lo le lelei o le fa'ata'ita'iga; E fa'alagolago i le saogalemu fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga ma fa'aauau pea le fa'amaoniga.

foundations.intro1: O faiga NLP fa'aonapo nei e lagolagoina ai le eletise fa'aautomatika, sailiga talafeagai, fa'amalosia o le malamalama, ma le galulue fa'atasi o gagana eseese. O le fa'atinoina lelei e mana'omia ai le lelei o le fa'ata'ita'iga ma le malosi o le fa'atonutonuina o le fa'agaioiga.
foundations.intro2: I Horizon, matou te taula'i atu i le iuga-i-le-iuga NLP faiga e tu'ufa'atasia malosi fa'amatalaga ma le matauina, pulega, ma fuaina gaosiga a'afiaga.

languageDetection.title: Su'esu'eina o le Gagana
languageDetection.description: Fa'ailoa le gagana mai vaega pu'upu'u po'o le umi o tusitusiga e fa'afeso'ota'i ai talosaga i le sa'o fa'agasologa paipa.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Su'esu'ega o lagona
sentimentAnalysis.description: Ave'ese lagona fa'amoemoe ma polarity mo tagata fa'atau atamai, lagolago fa'ata'ita'iga, ma oloa manatu faaalia matasele

entityExtraction.title: Fa'alapotopotoga Fa'alapotopotoga
entityExtraction.description: Iloa fa'alapotopotoga fa'atulagaina e pei o igoa, kamupani, nofoaga, ma aso mai tusitusiga e le'i fa'atulagaina.

translation.title: Faaliliuga
translation.description: Lagolagoina workflows multilingual e ala i le faaliliuina o tagata e faaaogāina-faatupuina po o le faagaoioia tusitusiga ao faatumauina le talaaga.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Lagolago ma Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Fa'avasega talosaga ulufale mai e ala i le faanatinati, fa'amoemoe, ma lagona e fa'avave ai le auala ma le tali lelei.

governedContentOperations.title: Fa'agaioiga o Mataupu Fa'atonutonu
governedContentOperations.description: Fa'aaoga faiga fa'avae-iloa gagana fa'amama ma fa'ata'ita'iga siaki ma fuaina sa'o ma manatua sini.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Malamalamaaga o Pisinisi e Tulia e Tusitusiga
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Tu'ufa'atasia faiga mai pepa, iloiloga, ma feso'ota'iga e fa'ailoa ai fuafuaga ma fa'agaioiga fa'aiuga.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Iloiloga e ala i le Fa'aaogaina o le Mataupu
evaluationByUseCase.description: O fa'ata'ita'iga e fa'atusatusa i fa'amaumauga fa'apitoa a'o le'i faia fa'aiuga fa'asa'olotoina.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Puipuiga o le Tagata-i-le-Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: O valo'aga maualuga e aofia ai auala iloiloga, tulafono fa'ateleina, ma fa'ailoga fa'atuatuaina manino.

continuousMonitoring.title: Mataituina faifai pea
continuousMonitoring.description: O le tafetafea, latency, ma le fa'aleagaina o le tulaga lelei o lo'o siakiina pea ina ia toe a'oa'oina ma toe fa'afo'i e fa'amalosia.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Su'esu'e le fa'ata'ita'iga o le evolusione i se siosiomaga feso'ota'i ma va'ai pe fa'afefea ona fa'aliliuina le tutusa mataupu faavae i le gaosiga o faiga fa'alelei.
hero.back: Toe fo'i i le Innovation Lab

scientificFoundation.title: Fa'avae Fa'asaienisi
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms o le faitau aofa'i o tagata fa'avae fa'aleleia metotia musuia e le natura filifilia ma fetu'una'iga.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Siosiomaga Feso'ota'iga Evolution
interactiveEnvironment.description: Tamo'e le fa'ata'ita'iga e va'ai ai i le fa'aleleia atili o le malosi i lea augatupulaga ma mata'ituina pe fa'afefea ona a'afia le fa'amalosia o le filifiliga.

productionUse.title: Fa'afefea ona fa'aaoga e Horizon lenei mea i le gaosiga
productionUse.description: O le masini su'esu'e lava lea e tasi o lo'o fa'aaogaina i lenei demo e fa'ailoa ai le fa'aleleia o paipa o lo'o fa'aaogaina i faiga fa'agaioiga.

applicationDomains.title: Lautele Talosaga Domains
applicationDomains.description: Evolutionary optimization e sili ona taua i faiga ma faamoemoega maoae ma tapulaa feteenai.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Nai lo le sailia o se fofo e tasi i le taimi, o algorithms o kenera e fa'atupuina ai le tele o tagata tauva. O augatupulaga ta'itasi e iloiloina e fa'atatau i se gaioiga fa'amalositino ma fa'amamaina e ala i le filifiliga, crossover, ma fesuia'iga.
scientificFoundation.intro2: O lenei mea e aoga ai i latou mo faafitauli maualuga-dimensional ma tapulaa lē linear, lea e avea ai auala deterministic brittle po o computationally taugata.

selection.title: Filifiliga
selection.description: O sui tauva maualuga e sili atu ona ola ma faatosinaina le isi augatupulaga.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: O uiga malolosi e toe tu'ufa'atasia e fausia ai ni fofo fou ma malosiaga fefiloi.

mutation.title: Suiga
mutation.description: O le fa'atonutonuina o le fa'asolosolo e fa'alauiloa ai le eseesega ina ia le fa'alavelave ai le sailiga i le lotoifale optima.

convergence.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i
convergence.description: I le tele o augatupulaga, o le faitau aofa'i o tagata o lo'o aga'i atu i fofo mautu ma maualuga.

resourceScheduling.title: Fa'atulagaina o Punaoa
resourceScheduling.description: Matou te fa'aaogaina metotia fa'ata'ita'iga e fa'alelei ai le fa'atulagaina o fa'atapula'aina o le tele o fa'atapula'aina pe a le mafai ai ona su'esu'eina.

architectureTuning.title: Fausaga Fausaga
architectureTuning.description: O fa'ata'ita'iga fa'apitoa e fa'aleleia atili ai le fa'atinoina ma le fa'atinoina o tau.

continuousOptimization.title: Fa'aauau pea le fa'aleleia
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization galuega taufetuli i matasele pulea ma telemetry manatu faaalia ina ia faiga fetuunai e pei o manaoga talaaga otooto.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Auala ma Logistics Fuafuaga
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Lavelave kilivaina ma auina atu fuafuaga manuia mai evolutionary sailiga pe a tapulaa suia vave.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Fa'ata'ita'iga ma Hyperparameter Su'esu'ega
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: E mafai e le su'esu'ega o kenera ona maua ai fa'ata'ita'iga fa'ata'ita'iga maualuga pe a pisapisao ma le le laina o luga fa'amoemoe.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Fa'afitauli o le Portfolio ma le Fa'asoaina
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization i lalo o sini tauva e mafai ona fa'atulagaina e pei o fefa'atauaiga fa'amalositino i luga o seti sui tauva.
